candidates.why: This is the primary top-line revenue figure and clearly represents total revenue/sales.
Represents financial income, not operating revenue; not appropriate for REVT.
Interest income is a financial item, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income is bottom-line, not top-line revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Select the main operating revenue line as the top-line figure.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials and change in inventories
candidates.why: Direct cost of materials and inventory changes; best representation of cost of goods sold.
Includes company-wide personnel costs that likely span production and SG&A; too broad for pure COGS.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly SG&A-related stock-based comp, not COGS.
Operating overhead, generally SG&A, not direct COGS.
Component of other operating expenses, overhead rather than direct production costs.
Marketing/advertising, clearly SG&A not COGS.
Administrative overhead, SG&A.
Net operating total, not a pure COGS line.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Net financing result, not COGS.
Balance sheet stock of raw materials, not period cost of goods sold.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials and change in inventories

variables.notes: Use the direct materials and inventory change line as COGS; other candidates are SG&A or totals.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation; clearly part of SG&A overhead.
Broad operating overhead bucket; typically includes various SG&A expenses.
Component of other operating expenses; also SG&A-type overhead.
Administrative overhead, a classic SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of intangible assets, which should be excluded from SG&A per instructions.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected multiple SG&A-type overhead components and excluded the amortization line per the rule to omit D&A from SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Represents amortization of capitalized R&D, which is the best available proxy for R&D expense in the income statement.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.
Balance sheet gross capitalized R&D, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated balance sheet contra-asset, not current period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value line, not a clean expense measure.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Use the amortization of capitalized R&D as the available R&D-related expense proxy.

candidates.why: Net interest line; used as a fallback if more specific expense lines are unavailable for a given period.
Main interest expense line; best primary measure of interest cost.
Interest component of lease obligations; a specific subset of interest expense.
Other interest-related items; can serve as additional fallback for interest expense.
Represents minority interest in profit, unrelated to interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; specific component of interest expense.
Equity for minorities, not interest expense.
Equity for minorities, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: primary gross interest expense first, then other and lease-specific interest components, with the net interest line as a final fallback.

candidates.row_label: Changes in the fair value of equity investments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI remeasurement item, not equity total.
Investment in associates, not shareholders' equity.
Represents total shareholders’ equity, the appropriate proxy for book equity given no separate parent-only equity line is shown.
Balancing line, not a clean equity total.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not pure equity.
Represents total assets/total funding, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Use Total equity as book equity because no separate parent-only equity line is provided; per instructions, MIB will be set to [] to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to non-controlling interests, not the balance sheet amount.
Balance sheet line for minority equity interests; normally appropriate for MIB.
Alternate label for non-controlling interests in equity; also suitable for MIB.
Income statement allocation of profit to minorities, not the stock of minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities, not the equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before minority allocation, not minority interest itself.

variables.notes: Per the instructions, because BE is mapped to 'Total equity' (which already includes non-controlling interests), MIB is set to an empty list to avoid double-counting minority interest in the BE+MIB denominator.
